name: unraid-modernui
description: Clean, flat, responsive theme for Unraid 7.x. v0.5.7: Docker page gains a per-container autostart pin + bulk autostart toggle, a transient "Starting…" state for post-action + post-reboot transitions (gated on server uptime so it doesn't misfire on crashed autostart containers), and a kebab menu that escapes folder overflow clipping via fixed positioning. Console/Logs now delegate to Unraid's openTerminal() helper instead of the non-existent Exec.php/Logging.php endpoints. Backend save-docker-autostart.php serializes concurrent writes under flock.

scripts.test: npm run test:ts && npm run test:php
